nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: 色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走
long cat model doesn't support NAG
use color match as a temporary method to maintain color consistency when using low-step lora.
sometime only the first loop can be saved.

nodes.title: Total frame count for Generate pre-video:
Loop frame count + n × (Loop frame count - overlap frame count)

widgets_values:
LongCat: 16fps
  480P: 832  x 480 x 93f
  720P: 1280 x 720 x 93f
  multiple of 16

increase audio_scale for stronger effect

audio_cfg adds extra model pass for improved/stronger lipsync, default range is 3-5

num_frames is the maximum frame count to generate, if the value is higher than your audio length would be, the audio length is used

The model uses audio stride 2, meaning output fps is 16 while input audio fps is 32

choose seed generation method:
1. fixed pre-set seed
2. increment based on pre-set seed
3. decrement based on pre-set seed
breake the seed link if you want randomize seed.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: the man is singing with motions and gestures
